dashboard.partialWarning: Some quotas running low, consider monitoring
dashboard.mostConsumed: Most consumed model is {{model}}, accounting for {{percent}}%
dashboard.noModelData: Unable to fetch model usage data

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage OpenCode Go accounts, appearance, and system behavior
settings.themeDesc: Choose interface theme, supports system preference
settings.trayDesc: Hide to tray when closing window instead of quitting
settings.noAccounts: No accounts yet, click "Add Account" to start
settings.autoSyncDesc: Periodically fetch the latest usage records
settings.backfillDesc: 50 records per page, fetches from the deepest history forward
settings.syncExplanation: fetches the latest usage records forward from the current position. When auto sync is enabled, the backend will execute it automatically at the set interval. Click the "Sync" button next to an account to trigger it manually.
settings.backfillExplanation: continues fetching forward from the deepest point already reached, specifically for historical data. Newly added accounts need backfill to see past records. More pages means more data fetched.
settings.newUserDesc: Add an account, click "Sync" to pull recent records. Auto sync is enabled by default, subsequent data will update automatically.
settings.oldUserDesc: Add an account, first click "Sync" to pull latest data, then click "Backfill" to pull historical records. It is recommended to set backfill to 500~1000 pages first, then click the "Backfill" button next to the account. Once backfill is complete, the dashboard and stats pages will show full data.
settings.resetDesc: Reset sync settings, refresh settings, etc. to initial values. Account data is not affected.
settings.name: Name
settings.confirmDeleteMsg: Are you sure you want to delete account {{name}}? Related usage records will also be deleted.
settings.toastTrayOn: Minimize to tray enabled, window will hide to system tray when closed

about.title: About 68HUB
about.desc1: 68HUB is a local usage statistics desktop app designed for OpenCode Go affordable Coding Plans.
about.desc2: OpenCode AI's official usage pages have scattered data and cumbersome operations, making it hard to grasp each model's token consumption and account quota status at a glance. 68HUB periodically syncs data through its backend, displaying key metrics with clear charts and layouts.
about.feature2: Model token consumption ranking and daily trends
about.feature3: Detailed usage record query and filtering
about.feature4: Auto-sync data, no manual refresh needed
about.thanksText: Backend inspiration from QuotaHub, rewritten as Hono + better-sqlite3 embedded in Electron main process,告别双进程打包.
about.devBuild: Dev build detected — debugging, are we? 🐛

titleBar.closeDialogDesc: You can minimize the app to the system tray and continue syncing data in the background.
